name: Grand Marnier Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Dates, chopped and dredged in small amount of flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and butter well.
2. Beat in eggs one at a time with mixer until well blended.
3. Add dry ingredients to creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in orange peel, dates, and pecans.
5. Pour batter into large buttered and floured tube pan or 3 medium loaf pans.
6. Bake at 325°F for 1 1/2 hours or until done. Cake should pull away from side of the pan when done.
7. Before removing cake while hot, punch a lot of holes in it.
8. Spoon icing on top.
Icing:
1 cup Orange Juice
2 cups Sugar
1/4 cup Grand Marnier
2 tablespoons Grated Orange Peel
Mix icing before making the cake and stir occasionally.
